response.step_by_step_log: 1. 00:00-02:27: The video consists of a single static scene throughout. 2. Identified the song as 'Ridin' on Dreams' by 'hololive IDOL PROJECT' based on on-screen text and background music. 3. Used search tool to find the official lyrics in Japanese and an English translation. 4. Verified the song title and artist information. 5. Constructing final JSON response.
response.global_summary: The video features a promotional graphic for the 'hololive 7th fes. Ridin' on Dreams' event, accompanied by a continuous playback of the event's theme song, 'Ridin' on Dreams' by hololive IDOL PROJECT.

scenes.description: The video displays a static screen with text 'hololive 7th fes. Ridin' on Dreams' and a message stating that the sneak peek has ended. The song 'Ridin' on Dreams' by hololive IDOL PROJECT plays throughout the entire duration of the video.

scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
Hey, it's because you were here
Hey, saying thanks again and again
I want to tell you right now
Come on, let's ride!

Ridin' on Dreams
Yeah!!
Wow oh oh...
Hey!! (Hey!!) Hey!! (Hey!!)
Yeah!!

Ah, from a small dream
To feelings I couldn't have imagined
It's become something bigger
I can't stop this excitement!

No matter how many times we get lost
Our bonds become the rudder
We can blow away even the slightest anxiety

In the middle of rowing through an endless journey
There will be difficulties, right?
Let's turn that into strength too
And advance together!

Hey, it's because you were here
Hey, we can't end this as just a dream
Let's overcome the rough waves too
I want to shine 'like myself'

Hey, the fact that I was able to meet you
Hey, is a treasure to me
Let's take each other's hands and call out to each other
In a world without a map
Let's keep going!

Ridin' on Dreams
Wow oh oh...
Hey!! (Hey!!) Hey!! (Hey!!)
Yeah!!

Even if sudden winds try to confuse our destination
I swore it that day
My determination won't waver

The back that tells me 'you have to do it properly'
Becomes a bridge to tomorrow
We have to cherish it more
Because 'the ordinary' doesn't exist

A story that begins from a small boat
Struggling, wondering where to start
Little by little, we formed a circle and found it
A dream that cannot be replaced by anything

Wow oh oh oh oh oh
Love even the incompleteness
Wow oh oh oh oh oh
Our feelings are one
Wow oh oh oh oh oh
Even if it's just a small hope
With you and me, forever
Even if they make fun of us
I want to believe!

Hey, 'thank you' isn't enough
Hey, my feelings are overflowing
We'll always be together!

Hey, it's because you were here
Hey, we can't end this as just a dream
Let's overcome the rough waves too
I want to shine 'like myself'

Hey, the fact that I was able to meet you
Hey, is a treasure to me
Let's take each other's hands and call out to each other
In a world without a map
We can still go further!

We're not alone
Stand up again and again
I want us to laugh together
Let's take all our wishes, come on!
Take each other's hands and go beyond our imagination
Let's keep going!

Ridin' on Dreams
Wow oh oh...
Hey!! (Hey!!) Hey!! (Hey!!)
Yeah!!
